name: Ashley Moody
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $172,593 for Ashley Moody in U.S. Senate, FL. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
